description: Local Python CLI worker for Czech government and tax filing automation. Work is being driven ad-hoc via /add-work (incremental task lifecycle, not upfront spec).
last_session_summary: Session 3 (continued): Phase 1 tasks 1.5-1.9 complete. Added 2 received invoices (AWS Mar, BDO Mar) and 2 issued (GOLD SPORT x2) for period 2026_1. Retroactively revised March FX rate 24.245→24.515 based on AWS Mar invoice, affecting Anthropic 0013 and Google 5527595008. Regenerated DAP lines 1/5/12/40/43; appended 2 A.4 rows to KH_A4 file. Created project skill /parse-invoices (.claude/commands/parse-invoices.md) encoding all tuned rules for future tranches.

phase_0_planning.name: Planning & Setup
phase_0_planning.description: Phase 0 REDEFINED: after Session 2, user directed project onto /add-work incremental lifecycle. Original upfront-spec flow (tasks 0.3-0.8) is superseded. Only understanding tasks (0.1, 0.1a, 0.2) remain useful. 0.9 (delete examples folder) is deferred pending user decision.

tasks.name: Read input materials and explore examples
tasks.verify: session_notes.md contains per-file summary of EVERY document in input/ with extracted requirements, constraints, and decisions

tasks.name: Confirm invoice data-source handling
tasks.added_reason: resources/ + dph-dap/ with real invoice data appeared during sessions 1 and 2; scope needed confirming.
tasks.verify: session_notes.md records invoice-handling decision (in scope / out of scope / deferred) with formats and role
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - TSVs in dph-dap/ understood; domain facts (DAP line numbers, KH sections, YYYY_Q period format, 21% VAT, CZK/EUR currencies) extracted. Note: broader spec using this data was later discarded by user directive.

tasks.name: Select playbook template and document rationale
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - rationale in session_notes.md. Note: under the new add-work lifecycle, template choice is informational only; no scaffolding was retained.

tasks.name: Draft IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md sections 1-3
tasks.superseded_reason: User retracted upfront-spec approach at end of Session 2 ('delete all you wrote. ad hoc tasks will be coming from me and we will formalise them one by one. just get on track add work lifecycle'). IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md file deleted.
tasks.verify: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md exists with Overview, Architecture, Technical Specs

tasks.name: Present spec to user and get approval
tasks.superseded_reason: No spec to approve under add-work lifecycle. The approval mechanism going forward is per-task via /add-work (user approves each proposed task individually).

tasks.name: Create project CLAUDE.md
tasks.superseded_reason: See 0.3. CLAUDE.md file deleted. Global ~/.claude instructions plus progress.json notes are sufficient for the add-work lifecycle.

tasks.name: Generate Phase 1 tasks
tasks.superseded_reason: See 0.3. tasks/ folder deleted. Future tasks added ad-hoc via /add-work.

tasks.name: Remove examples repo and commit Phase 0 completion
tasks.verify: syndicate-playbooks-examples/ removed, git log shows Phase 0 complete commit
tasks.notes: Deferred. User retracted the 'finish Phase 0 this session' directive; whether to delete the examples folder is no longer tied to an approval. Leave pending; user can trigger whenever.

phase_1_exploration_superseded.name: Setup & Exploration (SUPERSEDED)
phase_1_exploration_superseded.superseded_reason: Phase and all contained tasks were produced as part of superseded 0.7/0.8. Kept in file per append-only rule; do NOT treat as live work.

tasks.name: Add implementation tasks per confirmed scope

phase_1_invoice_intake.name: Invoice intake
phase_1_invoice_intake.description: Ongoing phase. Each intake tranche (month or batch of PDFs) is a set of tasks. First tranche: 2026/01 received invoices. Workflow is direct PDF reading + in-session LLM classification (no Python parser). Per user: 'some llm knowledge not only parser'.

tasks.name: Extract + classify all 23 PDFs in dph-dap/Přijaté Faktury/202601/
tasks.added_reason: User /add-work request to intake 2026/01 received invoices.
tasks.verify: dph-dap/.workbench-202601.tsv (gitignored) has one row per PDF with Typ, Zařazení_KH, DUZP, Základ_daně_CZK, DPH_21%_CZK, Celkem_CZK, období filled; unknowns flagged for review
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - 23 rows originally, all fields filled; 3 items flagged for user review (AWS duplicate, Polish SKI supplier classification, March 2026 FX rate). Task name mentions 23 PDFs; final tally after user deleted 2 source PDFs (AWS duplicate + SKI) is 21 rows in the kept workbench.

tasks.name: Present draft rows to user for review (BLOCKING)
tasks.verify: User explicitly approves the draft workbench rows or lists edits; approved set saved back to workbench TSV
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - User requested: (a) all období = 2026_1 regardless of DUZP, (b) two flagged PDFs deleted at source (AWS duplicate + SKI), (c) FX for March 2026 handled same as prior months (carry-over 24.245 from Feb anchor). Workbench rewritten to 21 rows, user approved for merge.
tasks.notes: BLOCKING: do not proceed to 1.3 without explicit approval.

tasks.name: Merge approved rows into Fakturace - prijate_faktury.tsv
tasks.verify: prijate_faktury.tsv row count increases by approved delta; no duplicate (Dodavatel, Číslo_faktury) pairs
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - appended 21 rows (data-row count 34 → 55, total 56 lines incl. header). awk duplicate check on (Dodavatel, Číslo_faktury) returned zero duplicates.

tasks.name: Regenerate affected aggregates: Fakturace - DAP.tsv (impacted periods) and Fakturace - KH_B2_prijate_nad_10k.tsv
tasks.verify: DAP lines 5/10/12/40/43 for impacted periods match sum of ledger rows with that KH/Typ classification; KH B.2 file contains every received domestic row with Celkem_CZK≥10000 in the affected period
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - DAP.tsv 2026_1: line 5 = 589.83/123.86 (3 Google RC), line 12 = 1310.76/275.27 (3 Anthropic RC), line 40 = 11580.07/2431.86 (15 domestic), line 43 = 1900.59/399.13 (= lines 5 + 12). Lines 1 and 10 remain 0/0. KH B.2: no new rows (max Celkem_CZK in batch was 1963.97 < 10000). Total batch Σ DPH = 2830.99 CZK.

tasks.name: Intake 2 additional received PDFs + retro-revise March 2026 FX rates
tasks.added_reason: User added EUINCZ26-57569.pdf (AWS Mar 2026) and Faktura 202600186.pdf (BDO Mar 2026); new AWS Mar invoice gives authoritative rate 24.515 which retroactively applies to Anthropic 0013 and Google 5527595008 (previously used Feb carry-over 24.245).
tasks.verify: workbench updated to 23 rows; prijate_faktury.tsv has 2 new rows appended and 2 FX-revised rows updated in place; no duplicate (Dodavatel, Číslo_faktury) pairs
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - workbench rewritten to 23 rows; 2 FX-revised in prijate_faktury.tsv via Edit (A0WDEPAH-0013: 436.41/91.65/528.06 → 441.27/92.67/533.94; 5527595008: 196.38/41.24/237.62 → 198.57/41.70/240.27); 2 new rows appended (BDO 202600186, AWS EUINCZ26-57569); ledger now 57 data rows; uniq -d returns empty.

tasks.name: Intake 2 issued invoices (GOLD SPORT s.r.o.) into Fakturace - vydane_faktury.tsv
tasks.added_reason: User added Vydaná faktura - 20260001.pdf and 20260002.pdf to dph-dap/Vydané faktury/2026/.
tasks.verify: vydane_faktury.tsv row count +=2; both rows DUZP in 2026_1; Zařazení_KH=A.4 (both ≥10k); no duplicates
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - 2 rows appended (20260001 Celkem 18150; 20260002 Celkem 39204); ledger now 5 data rows total (3 original + 2 new); uniq -d returns empty.

tasks.name: Regenerate DAP.tsv lines 1, 5, 12, 40, 43 for period 2026_1
tasks.verify: DAP 2026_1 lines match ledger sums after incorporating 2 new received + FX revisions + 2 new issued
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - DAP 2026_1: line 1 = 47400/9954 (2 GOLD SPORT issued); line 5 = 592.02/124.32 (3 Google RC, FX revised); line 12 = 1315.62/276.29 (3 Anthropic §108, FX revised); line 40 = 13702.36/2877.44 (17 domestic Tuzemsko received); line 43 = 1907.64/400.61 (= line 5 + line 12). Batch-wide cross-check: Σ VAT of all 23 received rows = 3278.05 CZK matches line 40+5+12 sum.

tasks.name: Regenerate Fakturace - KH_A4_vydane_nad_10k.tsv with 2 issued GOLD SPORT rows
tasks.verify: KH_A4 file contains GOLD SPORT 20260001 (18150) and 20260002 (39204) rows for period 2026_1
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - KH_A4 now has 4 data rows (2 BRAINMARKET from 2025_3, 2 new GOLD SPORT from 2026_1).

tasks.name: Create project skill /parse-invoices encoding classification rules
tasks.added_reason: User request: 'make a skill parse-invoices. the skill will read given folder with prijate and vydane and populate respective files with rules we tuned'. Consolidates all rules tuned in tasks 1.1-1.8 into a reusable skill.
tasks.verify: .claude/commands/parse-invoices.md exists; documents DAP line mapping, KH section rules, Typ classification, FX method, duplicate check, filing-period convention; skill appears in /help listing
tasks.verify_result: PASSED - .claude/commands/parse-invoices.md (~260 lines) with YAML frontmatter (description + allowed-tools) so it registers as a project skill; skill now listed as 'parse-invoices: Ingest invoice PDFs ... (project)'. Covers: arguments, files touched, Typ rules, KH section rules, DAP line mapping, FX method incl. retro-revision, filing-period override, duplicate check, known-supplier playbook, anti-patterns.

workflow: add-work lifecycle: user proposes each next task ad-hoc; /add-work registers it; /update-progress closes it. No upfront spec or phase plan.

orchestration.notes: Single mono-repo. Private GitHub repo. main tracks origin/main. Real financial data in dph-dap/ is gitignored and never pushed; tracked files (progress.json, session_notes.md) contain supplier DIČs/invoice numbers/sums — acceptable because repo is private.
